channel.title: Citadel Deep Research
channel.description: Deep research briefings and audio overviews for the Mills Citadel operating system.
channel.itunes:author: Brad Mills / Hermes Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Deep research briefings and audio overviews for the Mills Citadel operating system.

item.title: Real AI Operating Systems Comparison
item.description: NotebookLM audio overview for Brad Mills on real AI operating systems: llm-wiki/G-Brain/Hypatia as the knowledge kernel, Google OKF as the interoperability layer, Obsidian/Claude as an optional operator surface, Block/OpenExO as organization design references, and Dan Martell as the adoption cadence.
item.itunes:summary: NotebookLM audio overview for Brad Mills on real AI operating systems: llm-wiki/G-Brain/Hypatia as the knowledge kernel, Google OKF as the interoperability layer, Obsidian/Claude as an optional operator surface, Block/OpenExO as organization design references, and Dan Martell as the adoption cadence.
